case_title: REMOTE RADIOLOGY INTERNATIONAL, LTD ET AL VS. NINES, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO EXTEND TIME TO RESPOND TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100112845) FILED BY DEFENDANT NINES, INC.

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Michael A. Pearlson, Esq. michael.pearlson@ltlattorneys.com, Caleb Liang, Esq. Caleb.Liang@ltlattorneys.com, 213-612-8900, LTL Attorneys LLP, for Plaintiffs, Remote Radiology International, Ltd., et al .
Darryl M. Woo, Esq., DWoo@goodwinlaw.com, 415-733-6000, Goodwin Procter, LLP., for Defendant Nines, Inc.

After further clarification from the Court regarding the Court's tentative ruling, All parties submit on the tentative ruling. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Hearing is held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NINES, INC.'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is overruled as to the first, third, fourth, fifth, sixth, seventh, eighth, and ninth causes of action and sustained with leave to amend as to the second cause of action.

(See word minutes for complete details)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Christine Jordan CSR# 12262, email: Cjordan@sftc.org, Reported. (302/EPS)
